response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio for the dialogue and song lyrics matches the provided Reference JSON and on-screen visuals perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics for 'Gold Unbalance' were fully utilized for transcription and translation, with manual transcription used for the conversational segment (00:00-02:18). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are anchored strictly to vocal onsets. Applied aggressive truncation for the rapid-fire rap sections to prevent cascading delays and used instantaneous transitions for continuous lyrics.

subtitles.original: フワモコ、フワモコ見てくれてる？
subtitles.english: FuwaMoco, FuwaMoco, are you watching?

subtitles.original: Hi FuwaMoco! Thanks for coming! I love FuwaMoco!
subtitles.english: Hi FuwaMoco! Thanks for coming! I love FuwaMoco!

subtitles.original: あ、今からスタート？
subtitles.english: Oh, are we starting now?

subtitles.original: 今からスタート！
subtitles.english: Starting now!

subtitles.original: Okay, no problem. Push, push!
subtitles.english: Okay, no problem. Push, push!

subtitles.original: Go, go, go! Push, please!
subtitles.english: Go, go, go! Push, please!

subtitles.original: ちなみにカリオペの他のお知らせがあるんだけど...
subtitles.english: By the way, I have another announcement...

subtitles.original: カバー曲もリリースします！
subtitles.english: I'm releasing a cover song, too!

subtitles.original: Yes, check it out! The cover song is "In My Head" by NATOLI.
subtitles.english: Yes, check it out! The cover song is "In My Head" by NATOLI.

subtitles.original: Check it out, "In My Head"!
subtitles.english: Check it out, "In My Head"!

subtitles.original: I like song!
subtitles.english: I like that song!

subtitles.original: You like it? Yeah!
subtitles.english: You like it? Yeah!

subtitles.original: In my head! In my head!
subtitles.english: In my head! In my head!

subtitles.original: Please listen to it! 聴いてくださいね！
subtitles.english: Please listen to it! Please give it a listen!

subtitles.original: そう、このライブのあと、そしてそのあとは...
subtitles.english: Right, after this live, and after that...

subtitles.original: メンバー限定！
subtitles.english: It's members-only!

subtitles.original: Yes! And we have goods!
subtitles.english: Yes! And we have goods!

subtitles.original: Goods are going to be released very soon, so I wanted to tell you guys about them.
subtitles.english: Goods are going to be released very soon, so I wanted to tell you guys about them.

subtitles.original: グッズもありますので！Limited!
subtitles.english: We have goods available! Limited edition!

subtitles.original: Limitedもありますので、ちゃんとお伝えしたかったけど...
subtitles.english: There's limited merch, so I really wanted to tell you...

subtitles.original: 最後の方、配信の最後の方はCMを流します！
subtitles.english: At the end, at the end of the stream, we'll play a CM!

subtitles.original: But in about two minutes, 本当にもうすぐ...
subtitles.english: But in about two minutes, it's really coming soon...

subtitles.original: 出るから、そのURLをツイートするから...
subtitles.english: It's coming out, and I'll tweet the URL...

subtitles.original: 準備しといて！
subtitles.english: So get ready!

subtitles.original: Ready? 心も準備して。
subtitles.english: Ready? Get your heart ready, too.

subtitles.original: [Title: Mori Calliope Birthday 2026 Merchandise]
subtitles.english: [Title: Mori Calliope Birthday 2026 Merchandise]

subtitles.original: Oh, check it out! Here they are!
subtitles.english: Oh, check it out! Here they are!

subtitles.original: かっこいい！
subtitles.english: So cool!

subtitles.original: Dark fantasy Calliope! Dark fantasy!
subtitles.english: Dark fantasy Calliope! Dark fantasy!

subtitles.original: Thank you! I'm so cool! I'm like...
subtitles.english: Thank you! I'm so cool! I'm like...

subtitles.original: すっごい... あの魔王みたい！
subtitles.english: Amazing... like a Demon King!

subtitles.original: Yes! 魔王 is English what?
subtitles.english: Yes! What's "Maou" in English?

subtitles.original: 魔王... uh... like... なんて言えばいいかな？
subtitles.english: Demon King... uh... like... how should I say it?

subtitles.original: Dark... Dark King? Dark King!
subtitles.english: Dark... Dark King? Dark King!

subtitles.original: Dark King! Yes, Dark King!
subtitles.english: Dark King! Yes, Dark King!

subtitles.original: 英語上手いよ、すごい！
subtitles.english: Your English is so good, wow!

subtitles.original: あ、投票終了。Voting is over, by the way!
subtitles.english: Oh, voting is over. Voting is over, by the way!

subtitles.original: Voting is over! It's done! Yay!
subtitles.english: Voting is over! It's done! Yay!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much. Oh my god, I'm excited to see what you guys chose.
subtitles.english: Thank you so much. Oh my god, I'm excited to see what you guys chose.

subtitles.original: Now then, we should sing one more song then, shouldn't we?
subtitles.english: Now then, we should sing one more song then, shouldn't we?

subtitles.original: But look out for the goods! Goods URL is dropping soon, there's limited merch.
subtitles.english: But look out for the goods! Goods URL is dropping soon, there's limited merch.

subtitles.original: チェックしてね、グッズ買って！
subtitles.english: Check it out, and buy some goods!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please support us!

subtitles.original: Okay, so... たくさん休みましたね！
subtitles.english: Okay, so... we took a long break!

subtitles.original: So let's sing one more song!
subtitles.english: So let's sing one more song!

subtitles.original: もう一曲一緒に歌いたいと思います！
subtitles.english: I want to sing one more song together!

subtitles.original: いいですか皆さん？！
subtitles.english: Are you ready, everyone?!

subtitles.original: ん、じゃあ二人ならやれるさ！
subtitles.english: Mmm, then the two of us can do it!

subtitles.original: Next song is... "Gold Unbalance"!
subtitles.english: Next song is... "Gold Unbalance"!

subtitles.original: [Title: Gold Unbalance feat. Kento Nakajima]
subtitles.english: [Title: Gold Unbalance feat. Kento Nakajima]

subtitles.original: 不確かな物語に勝ち取るはアイデンティティー
subtitles.english: Winning back my identity in an uncertain story

subtitles.original: あれやこれと手を替え品を替え
subtitles.english: Trying this and that, switching tactics and items

subtitles.original: ドキりと胸を刺す激情
subtitles.english: A sudden rush of passion that stabs the heart

subtitles.original: 感情はノンフィクションで喜怒哀楽
subtitles.english: Emotions are non-fiction: joy, anger, sorrow, and pleasure

subtitles.original: 一心同体一切合切の衝動
subtitles.english: Body and soul as one, an all-encompassing impulse

subtitles.original: 失敗も成功も味わえ
subtitles.english: Savor both failure and success

subtitles.original: 我らゴールデンバディ
subtitles.english: We are the Golden Buddies

subtitles.original: 意味なんてないような世界で
subtitles.english: In a world that seems to have no meaning

subtitles.original: 偶然を重ねた光
subtitles.english: The light formed by layered coincidences

subtitles.original: 脈打つ鼓動
subtitles.english: The throbbing pulse

subtitles.original: 誰にもなれない言葉を紡いでよ
subtitles.english: Spin words that no one else can

subtitles.original: 舐めんじゃねーよ
subtitles.english: Don't mess with us

subtitles.original: 小さな勇気ひとつありゃ十分
subtitles.english: Just a single spark of courage is enough

subtitles.original: 強気に高みへと
subtitles.english: Confidently reaching for the heights

subtitles.original: 圧倒　絶頂
subtitles.english: Overwhelming, at the peak

subtitles.original: 2人ならやれるさ
subtitles.english: If it's the two of us, we can do it

subtitles.original: Back-to-back, no matter what
subtitles.english: Back-to-back, no matter what

subtitles.original: 背負ったもん武器に変わるSpot
subtitles.english: The place where our burdens become our weapons

subtitles.original: 段違い　遠くまで飛ばすShout
subtitles.english: On another level, sending our shouts far away

subtitles.original: 誰も邪魔できねぇこのRout
subtitles.english: No one can block this route

subtitles.original: 1等2等3通りって
subtitles.english: 1st place, 2nd place, 3 ways...

subtitles.original: はなからLoser
subtitles.english: A loser from the very start

subtitles.original: うざいくらい貪欲にハート地獄からかっぱらっちまえ
subtitles.english: Snatch their hearts from hell with annoying greed

subtitles.original: Loop輪廻じゃない
subtitles.english: It's not a loop of reincarnation

subtitles.original: Routeは無限に
subtitles.english: The routes are infinite

subtitles.original: ありふれた道じゃない荊の道を好む玄人
subtitles.english: An expert who prefers the thorny path over the common one

subtitles.original: A-ha-ha-ha!
subtitles.english: A-ha-ha-ha!

subtitles.original: 盛大にもう笑えばいいさ
subtitles.english: Go ahead and laugh out loud

subtitles.original: 才能煩脳のグラデーション
subtitles.english: A gradation of talent and worldly desires

subtitles.original: どうせならぐちゃぐちゃにしてよ
subtitles.english: Might as well make a mess of it all

subtitles.original: 始めたのならやり切る覚悟を
subtitles.english: If you've started, be prepared to finish

subtitles.original: 敗者と勝者のDuet
subtitles.english: A duet of winners and losers

subtitles.original: 劣等感弾き出された不条理の屑
subtitles.english: Scraps of absurdity cast out by inferiority complexes

subtitles.original: 振り払え貪欲に志は消えない
subtitles.english: Shake it off greedily; our will won't vanish

subtitles.original: 2人ならやれるさ
subtitles.english: If it's the two of us, we can do it

subtitles.original: 生きるってなんだサボった者勝ちか
subtitles.english: What does it mean to live? Is laziness the winner?

subtitles.original: そんなもの握りつぶせ
subtitles.english: Crush thoughts like that

subtitles.original: 上辺じゃいられない
subtitles.english: I can't stay on the surface

subtitles.original: エンタメライダー
subtitles.english: Entertainment Rider

subtitles.original: 人生賭け　駆け抜け
subtitles.english: Betting my life as I run through

subtitles.original: 絶望も栄光も
subtitles.english: Through both despair and glory

subtitles.original: Lemme see you fight back
subtitles.english: Lemme see you fight back

subtitles.original: どうなったって何も変わらないんだって
subtitles.english: Saying nothing changes no matter what happens

subtitles.original: ミームされた現実に囚われて
subtitles.english: Trapped in a memed reality

subtitles.original: This life where we're stuck taking chances
subtitles.english: This life where we're stuck taking chances

subtitles.original: 飽き飽きしてんでしょ？？
subtitles.english: You're sick of it, aren't you??

subtitles.original: We're living in a world with no direction
subtitles.english: We're living in a world with no direction

subtitles.original: Reach out with our light 'till we make a connection
subtitles.english: Reach out with our light 'till we make a connection

subtitles.original: Tearing the walls apart
subtitles.english: Tearing the walls apart

subtitles.original: Facing it all, side by side
subtitles.english: Facing it all, side by side

subtitles.original: Once again, it's us against the world
